scripts.install-all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run install-all && echo '✅ All dependencies installed!'
scripts.check:mysql: mysql -u root -e 'SELECT 1;' || echo '⚠️  MySQL not running. Start with: brew services start mysql'
scripts.check:db: mysql -u root aptitudeweb -e 'SELECT COUNT(*) as questions FROM questions;'
